innovation_1.name: 基于物理先验的三层角信号分解与几何材质分类模型
innovation_1.contribution_statement: We propose a physics-prior based three-layer angular signal decomposition model to explicitly separate intrinsic geometry and material properties from light fields.

innovation_2.name: 非朗伯体EPI失效的几何根因剖析与双分支自适应路由机制
innovation_2.contribution_statement: We identify the geometric root causes of non-Lambertian EPI failures and resolve them by designing a dual-branch adaptive routing mechanism.

innovation_3.name: 跨域光场分解特征的全局统计验证与多域平衡训练框架
innovation_3.contribution_statement: We demonstrate the cross-domain effectiveness of our decomposed features through global statistical verification and a multi-domain balanced training framework.
